name: flow-04-check-in-processor
description: T65 CheckInProcessor — PROCESSING archetype. Idempotent CAS: RSVP.status CONFIRMED → CHECKED_IN. Duplicate check-in returns success.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: cas-confirmed-to-checked-in, idempotent duplicate returns success
Retrieve PROCESSING arch pattern for T65: CAS status transition, idempotent check-in
Break T65 into: load RSVP → CAS update (CONFIRMED→CHECKED_IN, return success if already CHECKED_IN) → emit CheckedIn
Generate check-in-processor.service.ts — idempotent CAS: RSVP.status CONFIRMED → CHECKED_IN. Duplicate check-in returns success.
Named check validation: cas_confirmed_to_checked_in, idempotent_duplicate_success, no_unconditional_update
Score generated code 0-100 against T65 iron rules: CAS transition, idempotency on duplicate, status guard
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
